## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and optimize content generation grid for VAPI client, focusing on improving specificity and relevance of generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New unstructured article generation grid introduced with improved user-focused changes and clearer instructions](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Importance of manipulating the brief and outline for better final results highlighted](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Specific URL inclusion in research can lead to more reputable links and sources in the generated content](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Writing instructions now applied after the first draft, improving content alignment with brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

## Topics

### Content Grid Optimization

  - [New unstructured article generation grid introduced with improved user interface and clarity](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Key sections: keyword-driven title, company context, prospects, value props, writing instructions, and audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Grid designed to overcome default ranking-focused behavior and shift towards more editorial, client-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Matthew to test new grid alongside existing VAPI grid to compare results](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

### Content Generation Challenges for VAPI

  - [VAPI operates at the intersection of multiple industries (LLM models, voice agents, text-to-speech, STT)](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Need for content specifically applied to voice technology setting, not generic articles](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Client wants content on 200+ models available on their platform](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Balancing keyword value with narrow-casting to voice-intent audience](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Grid Usage Best Practices

  - [Spend time upfront on client-specific information](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Manipulate the brief for most influence on final output](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Include reputable article URL in research for better quality links and sources](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Prune outline to reduce word count from \~5000 to 2000-2500 words](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Use full slashes between distinct pieces of feedback in "Edits to make" section](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

### Internal and External Linking

  - [Internal linking attempts made by default if no specific instructions given](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
  - [External links can be manually specified for high-authority sources](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Client may specify internal links they want included](https://fathom.video/share/-cz1nDL3zZdwM8gxVKhKCA4-yGwjfr14?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
